title: Liberal construction
doc_html:
§207.  Liberal construction

This Chapter, being necessary for the welfare of the state, the city, the parish and its residents, shall be liberally construed to effect the purposes thereof.

Acts 2013, No. 410, §1, eff. June 20, 2013.
